text: Write a date/time stamp after each work output so the operator can see elapsed duration between outputs. DEFERRED pending operator clarification (Stage 2026-07-02). Scope ambiguity to resolve before planning: (1) WHICH surface -- CLI stdout of autoharness commands, agent chat/broadcast output (Stage/Ship), or an instruction-template rule that agents self-apply? (2) WHICH agents/outputs -- every message, only phase transitions, or only long-running work? (3) FORMAT -- absolute ISO-8601, delta-since-last-output, or both? Likely a small Primitive 6 (injection point) / Primitive 7 (observability) instruction-template tweak once scoped. Not batched into shipment 057-S (different concern from the closure guard).
